ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, client) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client associated with the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last visit */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits by the user */,
  "total_orders" INTEGER /* Total number of orders placed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_details" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the visit */,
  "seconds_amount" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  "pushornot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user received a push notification during the visit (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "orderornot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user placed an order during the visit (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., new, returning) */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Source of the visit */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the visit */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_details_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the client */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client */,
  "plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the client account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the website */,
  "analytics_code" TEXT /* Analytics code for the website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the website was added to the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "website_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the visit */,
  "seconds_amount" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  "pushornot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user received a push notification during the visit (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "orderornot" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user placed an order during the visit (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "bounce" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user bounced from the website */,
  "exit_page" TEXT /* Last page visited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_website_visits_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
